pages.text: $(italic)Spice of Life: Classic$() — your $(bold)food tracker$(). It lists the meals still held against you by the varied-diet rule, so you can see at a glance which foods have worn out and which are fresh again. Read it alongside the value shown on each food's tooltip.$(br2)For the rule itself, see $(l:2_hearth_season/varied_table)A Varied Table$().$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + any $(italic)crop$(), shapeless.
pages.title: Food History Book
